title: TrajectoryViewExport
description: TrajectoryView with schemaVersion, as embedded in EvalRunEnvelope repetitions.

__schema1.description: Harness-assigned session identifier from the vendor stream.

__schema2.description: Model identifier used for the session, e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6.

__schema3.description: Working directory the harness used for the run.

__schema4.description: Permission mode active for the session, when reported by the harness.

__schema6.description: Tool names the harness reported as available at session start.

__schema8.description: MCP servers configured for the session, with connection status.

McpServer.title: McpServer
McpServer.description: MCP server entry from session initialization metadata.

__schema9.description: MCP server name as reported by the harness.

__schema10.description: Connection status at session start, e.g. connected or failed.

SessionMeta.title: SessionMeta
SessionMeta.description: Session metadata captured from harness initialization (e.g. Claude system/init).

__schema11.description: Every tool call in global emission order.

ToolCall.title: ToolCall
ToolCall.description: One tool invocation in emission order. Primary unit for behavioral assertions.

__schema12.description: Fully-qualified tool name, e.g. mcp__plugin_alis-build_api__SearchSkills or Bash.

__schema13.description: Namespace prefix for MCP-style names (mcp__<server>), or null for built-in tools.

__schema15.description: Vendor tool-use block id; matches a later tool_result.tool_use_id when present.

__schema16.description: Arguments the model emitted for this tool call. Tool-specific schema.

__schema17.description: Tool result payload, or null if no result was observed (e.g. process killed).

__schema19.description: Whether the tool reported an error in its result envelope.

__schema20.description: Assistant turn that produced this call. Parallel calls in one message share a turnIndex.

__schema21.description: Index in the global ordered tool-call sequence (used for called_before assertions).

__schema22.description: Assistant turns with per-turn text and tool calls.

AssistantTurn.title: AssistantTurn
AssistantTurn.description: One assistant turn: text content plus any tool calls in that turn.

__schema24.description: Assistant text emitted in this turn (may be empty for tool-only turns).

__schema25.description: Tool calls emitted in this turn, in block order.

__schema26.description: Model stop reason for this turn, or null if not reported.

__schema28.description: All assistant text concatenated across turns. Used for response_contains assertions.

__schema29.description: Stop reason of the last assistant turn.

__schema31.description: Aggregate usage and cost for the session.

__schema32.description: Total input tokens for the session.

__schema33.description: Total output tokens for the session.

__schema34.description: Total session cost in USD when reported by the harness.

__schema35.description: Session duration in milliseconds from harness result metadata.

__schema36.description: Number of assistant turns in the session.

UsageSummary.title: UsageSummary
UsageSummary.description: Aggregate token usage, cost, and timing from the harness result.

__schema37.description: Retry events observed during the run.

RetryRecord.title: RetryRecord
RetryRecord.description: Rate-limit or transient error retry observed during the run.

__schema38.description: Approximate milliseconds since session start when the retry was observed.

__schema39.description: Raw vendor payload from the retry event (e.g. system/api_retry).

__schema40.description: Whether the harness result envelope indicated success.

__schema41.description: TrajectoryView schema version for storage and API interchange.
